# OP Flow Insight v0.1.1-r8

## New

- **NSS hardware offload support** — accurate traffic statistics on MT7986A (MediaTek Filogic) even with hardware flow offload enabled. Reads `/sys/kernel/debug/ppe{0,1}/entries` for hardware-level byte/packet counters. Non-MediaTek platforms unaffected (silently skip).
- **Multi-arch builds** — GitHub Actions now builds for both x86_64 and aarch64_cortex-a53 (ImmortalWrt 24.10 IPK + 25.12 APK).

## Changes

- `internal/nss/` — New package: PPE hardware flow table parser.
- `internal/collector/` — `pollNSS()` runs alongside conntrack polling, accumulates hardware byte counts per host.
- `internal/model/` — Health struct now reports `nss_readable`.
- `openwrt/package/Makefile` — `@TARGET_x86_64` dependency removed for multi-arch support.

## Packages

| Format | Arch | File |
|--------|------|------|
| APK (25.12) | x86_64 | `op-flow-insight-0.1.1-r8-x86_64.apk` |
| APK (25.12) | aarch64_cortex-a53 | `op-flow-insight-0.1.1-r8-aarch64_cortex-a53.apk` |
| IPK (24.10) | x86_64 | `op-flow-insight_0.1.1-r8_x86_64.ipk` |
| IPK (24.10) | aarch64_cortex-a53 | `op-flow-insight_0.1.1-r8_aarch64_cortex-a53.ipk` |
